name: Samurai Dash
description: Defend the temple as the last guardian. Renegade samurai attack from all sides — your only defense is speed. Draw first or fall in battle. Duel Rules:Precision: Attack before your rival draws their katana. Survival: You have 3 lives. As time passes, enemies become faster. Glory: Survive as long as possible to dominate the leaderboard.
instructions: Keyboard Arrow keys larr rarr to attack Touch Tap Left or Right
